title: CoSof
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''CoSof''''' was a group of two [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During the [[Diplomatic Summit at Sullust|diplomatic meeting]] between the Sullustans and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]] they carried Sullustan diplomats and were boarded by the Rebel transport group ''[[Tector]]'' in order to receive the abducted Sullustan technicians, just rescued by the Alliance. The meeting was interrupted by the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]. [[Hamo Blastwell]] and [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], flying [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]], held off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] until the meeting was concluded and all ships fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
